user.title: Growatt Shiner
user.description: Sign in with your Growatt Shiner (shiner-us.growatt.com) account. You'll enter a captcha on the next screen.

data_description.password: Stored so the integration can re-authenticate automatically when the ~30-day session expires.
data_description.ai_task_entity: An AI Task entity (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, local Ollama, ...) used to read the login captcha automatically for unattended re-authentication. Leave blank to use your default AI Task entity, or to solve captchas manually.

captcha.title: Enter the captcha
captcha.description:
Type the code shown in the image, then continue.

![Captcha]({captcha_image})

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your Growatt Shiner session for {username} has expired. Re-enter your password to sign in again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Growatt Shiner. Check your connection and try again.
error.invalid_captcha: Incorrect captcha code. A new captcha has been loaded — please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Growatt Shiner account is already configured.

data.ai_task_entity: AI Task entity for captcha solving

data_description.ai_task_entity: Used to auto-solve the login captcha for unattended re-authentication. Leave blank to use your default AI Task entity.
